title: Board of Trustees elects new chair, members
summary_en: Penny Pennington, managing partner of Edward Jones, a St. Louis-based finanical services company, has been elected to serve as chair of the WashU Board of Trustees effective July 1. Pennington will be the first woman to hold the position.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学校董会选举产生新任主席及校董成员

title: Class Acts: Amanda Kesler
summary_en: After an EF3 tornado ripped a milewide path through St. Louis and St. Louis County, Amanda Kesler, a master of landscape architecture candidate in the WashU Sam Fox School, combined aerial data and firsthand observation to map tree canopy damage.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）学子阿曼达·凯斯勒参与圣路易斯龙卷风灾后林木排查及相关设计工作

title: Class Acts: Noah Kabbaj
summary_en: Goldwater Scholar and biology major Noah Kabbaj is on the front lines of research aimed at helping people overcome treatment-resistant mental health conditions, including severe depression. After graduating from WashU, Kabbaj plans to earn his PhD in neuroscience.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学优秀学生诺亚·卡巴杰致力难治性精神疾病治疗研究

title: Class Acts: Ruiqi Wang
summary_en: Ruiqi Wang is set to graduate from WashU McKelvey Engineering and next will work for Google the improve machine learning.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学博士生王瑞祺研发居家认知辅助智能系统获谷歌博士奖学金

title: The Class of 2026: Student researchers create knowledge, communicate purpose
summary_en: In celebration of Commencement, WashU Class Acts spotlights 2026 graduates who have engaged in meaningful research at WashU. They have created knowledge and mastered research skills — especially important at a time of funding cuts and public skepticism.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学2026届学生研究者开展知识创新、践行科研使命

title: WashU Law to host Model Constitutional Convention
summary_en: The Washington University in St. Louis School of Law will host a national Model Constitutional Convention May 21–24.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学法学院将主办美国全国模拟制宪会议

title: Dosenbach named inaugural David M. and Tracy S. Holtzman Professor of Neurology
summary_en: Nico Dosenbach, MD, PhD, is internationally recognized for his research in precision brain mapping and discovery of the network within the brain that links cognition with movement.
title_cn: 尼科·U·多森巴赫就任华盛顿大学医学院首任戴维·M·霍尔茨曼与特雷西·S·霍尔茨曼神经病学讲席教授

title: WashU, Sodexo partner with Operation Food Search
summary_en: WashU and Sodexo teamed up to make it easy for students to donate extra meal points to help feed children in the St. Louis area.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）联合索迪斯集团与“食物搜寻行动”组织开展公益食品捐赠活动

title: SCOTUS decision could prove catastrophic for minority political power
summary_en: The Supreme Court on April 29 struck down a voting map in Louisiana, creating a path for other states to redraw congressional maps that could affect elections for years. The result may be disastrous for racial minority political power in the United States, says an expert on voting rights law at Washington University in St. Louis.
title_cn: 美国联邦最高法院裁决或对少数族裔政治权力造成灾难性影响

title: Class Act: Ariel Hernandez-Leyva
summary_en: In May, Ariel Hernandez-Leyva is set to achieve his goal of becoming a physician-scientist by earning a medical degree and a PhD in computational and systems biology from WashU Medicine. He is first author on a study — published in the prestigious journal Cell Metabolism — revealing that breath can carry clues to gut microbiome health, particularly among children.
title_cn: 《华盛顿大学医学院科研人员阿里尔·埃尔南德斯-莱瓦科研成长经历及相关研究成果发布》
